name: Men's HRT / Wellness Intake Classifier
purpose: Classify wellness goals and possible testosterone-deficiency symptom clusters.

name: Testosterone Deficiency Diagnostic Gate
purpose: Wellness goal can trigger evaluation, but TRT candidate logic requires symptoms/signs plus consistently low morning testosterone on repeat testing.

name: Wellness Non-TRT Pathway
purpose: If no confirmed testosterone-deficiency pattern, route to sleep, nutrition, exercise, medication, cardiometabolic, thyroid/anemia/OSA review.

name: Primary vs Secondary Workup
purpose: After confirmed low testosterone, route to LH/FSH and cause evaluation.

name: Fertility Preservation Gate
purpose: If fertility is desired, do not auto-clear exogenous TRT; route to fertility-preserving pathway review.

name: Prostate / PSA / BPH Gate
purpose: Screen prostate cancer risk, PSA/prostate findings, metastatic disease, and severe LUTS/BPH before testosterone pathway.

name: Hematocrit / Polycythemia Gate
purpose: Require baseline and follow-up hematocrit review; elevated hematocrit is a hold/review condition.

name: CV / Blood Pressure Gate
purpose: Screen BP, heart failure, recent MI/stroke, thrombophilia/VTE risk, and unstable CV symptoms before TRT.

name: OSA / LUTS Gate
purpose: Screen untreated severe OSA and severe LUTS before TRT; do not overinterpret mild/moderate BPH updates as universal clearance.

name: Monitoring and Response Module
purpose: Track symptom response, adverse effects, adherence, hematocrit, PSA/prostate monitoring where applicable, and BP; discontinue/review if no meaningful benefit or safety issue.
